name: Florida Canyon Gold Inc.
description: Florida Canyon Gold Inc. is a Canadian gold and silver producer focused on the operation, development, and exploration of its 100%-owned Florida Canyon Mine located in Nevada, USA, as well as its El Castillo Complex in Durango, Mexico. The company was spun out from Integra Resources Corp. in 2024 to focus on these producing and development-stage precious metals assets, aiming to deliver sustainable production and growth through exploration and operational optimization.
